# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment that mounts host directories for our logging agent. The pod needs access to /var/log and /var/lib/docker to collect logs from all containers. This is for our centralized logging system that runs as a DaemonSet.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logging-agent
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: logging-agent
        image: <logging-agent-image>
        volumeMounts:
        - name: var-log
          mountPath: /var/log
        - name: var-lib-docker
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker
        securityContext:
          privileged: false
          capabilities:
            add:
              - SYSLOG
      volumes:
      - name: var-log
        hostPath:
          path: /var/log
          type: Directory
      - name: var-lib-docker
        hostPath:
          path: /var/lib/docker
          type: Directory
  strategy:
    type: Recreate

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
  name: logging-agent-daemonset
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logging-agent
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: logging-agent
        image: <logging-agent-image>
        volumeMounts:
        - name: var-log
          mountPath: /var/log
        - name: var-lib-docker
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker
        securityContext:
          privileged: false
          capabilities:
            add:
              - SYSLOG
      volumes:
      - name: var-log
        hostPath:
          path: /var/log
          type: Directory
      - name: var-lib-docker
        hostPath:
          path: /var/lib/docker
          type: Directory
